title: ranunculus macrophyllus var. corsicus
intro: Ranunculus macrophyllus var. corsicus, also known as Corsican buttercup, is a variety of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus macrophyllus var. corsicus include reducing inflammation and relieving spasms in the digestive system, as well as acting as a mild sedative. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
